titleStmt.title: SII 35.77: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 77. (A.R. No. 95 of 1951-52.) RAṬṬIHAḶḶI, KOD TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Stone (No. II) kept Madhyamaṇḍapa of the Kadaṁbēśvara temple.

This inscription, referring itself to the reign of Siṁghaṇadēva, is dated Śaka 1160, Viḷaṁbi, Mārgaśira Amāvāsyā, Monday, solar eclipse corresponding to A.D. 1238, December 8. The weekday, however, was Wednesday.

This inscription refers to the rule of Siṅghaṇa II, whose grandfather and father Bhillama II and Jaitugi I respectively, are also eulogized. Siṅghaṇa's subordinate was Ārya Malla or Malliseṭṭi who at his masters instance, proceeded against Nārasiṁha II and seized from him fourteen elephants. This Narasiṁha is identical with the Hoysaḷa king of that time. The record gives the genealogy of this general who was the son of Bomma. Malla's sons were Rēva, Honnabomma, Chāvuṇḍa and Achala. The epigraph then praises the achievements of Honnabomma who had his capital of Muḷugunda. His son was Gupta Malla.

The inscription refers to Nūṟumbāḍa in Banavāsināḍu with Raṭṭapaḷḷi as its capital, which was being governed by the chiefs of the Kaḍamba family whose genealogy is also given. Kētarasa III of this family had two sons whose names are revealed in this record as Garuḍapāṇḍya and Vīrapāṇḍya.

It also contains a genealogical account of the preceptors of the Kāḷamūkha sect, Parvatāvaḷi and Kiṭṭagāveanvaya. The record states that Honnabommiseṭṭi had the deities Mallēśvara and Rājēśvara installed within the temple of Kaḍaṁbēśvara and registers a gift of the village Kaḍavūr, other lands etc. The gift was made over to rājaguru Mūṟujāvidēva disciple of Lakūḷiśa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:

śrī gaurīnayanōtpaḷarāgasudhā¨rṇnavasudhākaraṁ haranudbhōganidhi hoṁnabaṁma girevagō
mudade vāṁcchitā¨rtthōtukaramaṁ . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ
paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ yādavānvayamāhātme samuddhārakaṁ gū¨rjjarakarīṁdra caṁcatu
paṁcānanaṁ sakaḷasāhityacaturacaturānanaṁ teluṁgōttuṁgaśiracchēdakara śrutismiti purāṇōktamahādānādi guṇasaṁpādakanumeni
sida siṁhaṇakṣōṇipāḷana vaṁśōṁnatiyeṁtenaṁ . bhillama bhūbhujaṁbhuvanabhuṁbhuka maṁḍaḷikādyaśēṣa bhūvallabharaṁ karaṁ bharadinaṁ
cisi kappamanottikoṁḍu mēleṁdeniṣi¨rdda vikramadaḷu¨rkkege tā neleyāgi kī¨rttisadvallari yoṁdu pa¨rbbugege lōkamanāśrayayamāge māḍidaṁ . tattane
yaṁ . jaituginripāḷanakhiḷadharātaḷamaṁ taṁna bhūribhujasikharadoḷāṁ tātakī¨rttiyanakhiḷadiśātaṭadoḷu nilisidaṁ pratāpanidhānaṁ . matta
mātana tanūbhavanaṁ . māḷavalāḷacōḷamagadhādinripāḷaviśāḷa śau¨ryyani¨rmmūḷa-nadakṣaniṁdravibhavaṁ caturāṁbudhivēṣṭitō¨rvvarāpāḷanaśīḷaneṁ
ba mahimōṁnatiyaṁ taḷedaṁ samastavidyālalanāpriyaṁ prathitasiṁhaṇaneṁba dharātaḷēśvaraṁ . śrīrājaṁ kavimauḷipādayugabhritsrī hoṁnabaṁ
maṁge kū¨rttu rājēśvaranige vīrasiriyaṁ śrīmallināthēśvaraṁ kāruṇyapriyadiṁde vū¨rjjitasukhaśrīyaṁ manōrāgadiṁ gaurīśaṁ kaḍaṁbēśvara nijaguṇa śrī
yāyumārōgyamaṁ . paramanurāgamaṁ paramatējavanuṁnatamappa lakṣmīyaṁ suruciravāṇiyaṁ sukara bhaktiya nittaru hoṁnabaṁmagādaradoḷ
yabjanabjasakhanabujaviḷōcananabujasaṁbhavaṁ haruṣadoḷabuja sēkharanumintivaruṁ mudadiṁdava¨rtthiyiṁ . jaṁbudvīpada madhyadi hoṁbaṁṇada mēṟumadara teṁka
ṇadikkottaṁbada himadiṁ dakṣiṇadaṁbudhipariyanta siṁhaṇō¨rvvipanāḷvaṁ . śrī madyādavavārija¨rkkanadaṭaṁ śrībhillamāṁkātmajaṁ kṣmāvallabha jaitapāḷanakhiḷaṁ
bhūpāḷagōpāḷanuddāmaṁ tattaneyaṁ pratāpaniḷayaṁ sauva¨rṇnatā¨rkṣyadhvajaṁ bhīmaṁ tuṁgayaśōṁganādhipavaraṁ nārāyaṇaṁ . māḷava
kāḷadaṁḍadharanaṁgamanōbhavamānabhaṁganā gauḷanrupapracaṁḍagaḷaga¨rttari gū¨rjjaraśaiḷavajra nēpāḷakuḷāṭavi prakaṭa dāvananaṁdhra niraṁdhranu¨rbbiyoḷbāḷa baḷā
hakaprabaḷamārutanī nripa śiṁhaṇō¨rvvipaṁ . koṁkaṇacakrirāyabaḷadaṁḍadharaṁ prabhuvā¨ryya mallanā teṁkaṇa dēśavaṁ paḍedu siṁhaṇaniṁ besanāgi pōgi niḥśaṁ
kadi nāraśiṁhanripanaggada dēśavanātanēṟutippaṁkada biṁkadāne hadinālkane taṁdanulā¨ryya śau¨ryadiṁ . kṣārasamudramuṁ karataḷakkesedi¨rddudu kuṁbhajaṁge yā
kṣīrasamudramuṁ śayanakādudadaṁdu janā¨rddanaṁge saṁsāra samudramuṁ kayge vaṁdudadaṁdu śukaṁge yiṁdidi dōrasamudramuṁ kayige vaṁduda
dāriya malliseṭṭiyāṁ . Āriya boṁmana maganappāriya mallana tanūja nāriya rēvaṁ vīranuru hoṁnaboṁmanudāraṁ cāUṁḍana caḷanacaḷanudāttaṁ . rā
jaladēvi tāyene mahāmahimaṁ gurusiddhayōgi hridrājita guptamallanadhidaivame kāmaladēvi rāṇi kumāranu guptamallanenalā muḷuguṁdame rājadhā
ni vibhrājise dānadha¨rmmanuditōdita hoṁnaboṁmaṇaṁ . Uripidanaṁdu bhāḷanayanā¨rccigaḷiṁpuramaṁ mahīśanaṁduripidanā trikūṭamanu mā
ruti puṁchadiniṁdrasūnuvaṁduripidanagnibāṇadoḷe khāṁḍavamuṁ varahoṁnaboṁmaniṁduripidaneyde kōḍamogha koppala dōrasamudradu¨rggamaṁ . sura
dhēnu kalpabhūjaṁ vareciṁtāmaṇigaḷeṁbavēvavenuttaṁ varahoṁnaboṁmanoppuva karavīUdu bēḷpeva¨rgge bēḷpa¨rtthamumaṁ . jaṁgamadicce jaṁgamada nacceke jaṁ
gama meccu mattavā jaṁgamadāṭa jaṁgamada nōṭame jaṁgama kūṭavāgaḷuṁ jaṁgamadāse jaṁgamada bhāseyoḷudchavikāse rājisippaṁ gaḍaneṁdu baṇnipudu bhūvaḷeyaṁ
neṟe hoṁnaboṁmanaṁ . sarasijaga¨rbbhināsyadoḷe bhārati kṛṣṇana vakṣadēśadoḷu siri haranaṁgabhāgadoḷu pā¨rvvati cittaja cittavṛttiyoḷu vararatiyante bhūtaḷadoḷuṁna
tiyiṁ sivacitta boṁmanoḷu sarasijavaktre vistṟuta kaḷānvite kāmaladēviyoppidaḷuṁ . Umage pinākige kumāraṁ samanisidaṁtodave hoṁnaboṁmmaṁgaṁtā kamaḷa
mukhi kōmalāṁgige gumitayyaṁ kalpabhūja ciṁtāmaṇivoluṁ . jaḷajākṣiyara manaṁgaḷaneḷaguḷikoḷpoṁdu sobagu sogayipa rūpaggaḷavenipa seṭṭi rēvaṁ na
ḷa naḷakūbara jayanta kantu pratimaṁ . hoṁnaṁ bēḍidaḍitta nittanavanīcakrakke sadrāgadiṁ muṁnaṁ kaṁneya kaṁdaniṁdu viḷasadrājāṁbikā naṁdanaṁ hoṁnaṁ bēḍidanittanittapanivaṁThe letter jāṁbikā are engraved above the line in smaller characters.
śrī hoṁnaboṁmmaṁ susaṁpaṁnaṁ gupta sumallikā¨rjuna sadāṁbōjātasēvākaraṁ . vananidhimēkhaḷāvaḷeyitō¨rvvige maṁḍanavādudeṁbinaṁ banavasenāḍoḷuṁnati
kevettasedippuduraṭṭapaḷḷinaṁdanavanadēvatābhavanasaṁkuḷadiṁdvijarājarājiyiṁdanupama raṁmya ha¨rmyatatiyiṁdati sēbyavadentu nō¨rppaḍaṁ . baḷasidanaṁdanāḷi ba
ḷadoppuva cūtalatāḷi puṣṭasaṁkuḷada vanāḷi pāḍuva madāḷi kukilva pikāḷi taṇpugoṁḍeḷasuva gāḷi śāḷivanadoḷīpodaḷda śukāḷi śōbheyaṁ taḷadire raṭṭapaḷḷi
ramaṇīyakaraṁ vasudhāntarāḷadoḷuṁ . tarataradiṁde saṁdaṇisidoḷugaḍaliṁ kaḍalottugoṁḍa pe[¨rdde]regaḷa mottadiṁ tereya mottadoḷoṁdida tīravikṣa baṁdhura
kusmāḷiyiṁ kusumarēṇuvitānadinoppi tō¨rppa śikaranikaraṁgaḷiṁdeseUdaṁta kumudvatī tarupradēśadoḷuṁ . Antesava raṭṭapaḷḷigadhinātharenipa kaḍaṁbānvayada rā
rājāvaḷiyeṁteṁdaḍeṁ . vri . Anaṁtārātiyanēṟedoṁde hayadiṁ gelvājiraṁgāgradoḷu manadiṁ muṁpiḍideydi tatturaga diṁ taddaṁtiyaṁ cakrigattanavaṁThe letter ga is engraved above the line.
dyaṁ paḍedaṁ manōmudade nūṟuṁbāḍamaṁ bīradēvane vīrāṁganegāṇmaneṁdu pogaḷuguṁ viśvaṁbharāmaṁḍaḷaṁ . ka . Ātananujātanadaṭaṁ kētarasaṁ tattanūbhavaṁ
nāmarasaṁ nītinidhi tattanūjaṁ nūtanacariyenisi kētabhūpaṁ negaḷdaṁ . tattaneyaṁ polakēsi nripōttamanunripana tammanaggada heṁmaṁ vittabhujanavana kuladoḷaguttama
nene negaḷdaneseye raṇakanripāḷaṁ . tatu kaḍaṁba vaṁśadoḷuṁ . Aṁtā kētanripāḷaṁgaṁ taneyaṁ ¨rmmūvarādarū¨rjjitatēja bhrāṁtēno bīradēvaṁ kaṁtunibhaṁ baṁmadē
vanuṁ mallanripaṁ . ka . Avaroḷu bīranripāḷōdbhavanenisi negaḷtevetta kētarasaṁgutsavadiṁ puṭṭidanadaṭaṁ bhuvanastuta garuḍapāṁḍyanāhavaśauṁḍaṁ . bhaṁḍaḷadoḷahi
tapaṁnagamaṁḍaḷiyaṁ nijakrupāṇacaṁcvāhatiyiṁ khaṁḍisuva nenaladēnuddhaḍano maṁḍaḷika garuḍapāṁḍyanripāḷaṁ . vri . tadanujanuddhataṁ kupiThe letter va is engraved above the line in cursive form.
tha vayirige kālakritāṁtarūpaneṁbudu vibhudēṣṭaśiṣṭatatigoppuva jaṁgamakalpabhūjaneṁbudu varakāminīsamitigētane nūtana paṁcabāṇaneṁbudu nanikhiḷāvaniva
ḷeyamutsavadiṁ sale vīrapāṁḍyanaṁ . Āgurukaṁḷōṁnatiya mahimōṁnatiyeṁteṁdaḍeṁ . kāḷāmukhavādiyāge samāḷaṁkrita sūtradhātu pe¨rbbatā
vaḷiyeṁdiṁtāḷōkisi kiṭṭagāveyānvitadoḷaṁ kāḷāmukha śrīviḷāsa maṇimukakuruṁdaṁ . Ene vāmaśaktiyati puṇyanidhānaṁ negaḷdanā munīśana śiṣyaṁ
manucaritaṁbōdhīmadēbhanakhāyudhanenipa vādi rudraśaktimunīṁdraṁ . Aṁtava¨rggaḷa śiṣyaruṁ . Esevaṁ śrīkaṁṭhadēvaṁ budhanidhi tadapatya tadīyōdva
śiṣyaṁ kusumāstratryakṣanu¨rbbīprathitaguṇanivāsaṁ kriyāśaktidēvaṁ daśavaṁ tatsiṣyanāntaṁ vinata phalasuhrinmauḷi māṇikyakāṁti prasarōdya
tukēsarāṁghridvayasarasīruhōdubhāti sa¨rbbēśvarā¨ryyaṁ . tanumanapriya śiṣyaṁ . vadanaṁ cātu¨ryyavāṇīviharaṇa sadanaṁ saṁda taṁnētravāpo
¨rṇnadayāpātraṁ svahastaṁ vitaraṇa caraṇābhyastavātmīya vakṣaṁ viditatryakṣaṁ sadrikṣāyatitati tanagilleṁbinaṁ nityasatyābhyudayaṁ kalyāṇiśaktibratipa
ti negaḷdaṁ pūtavriṁdāvadāṁtaṁ . ślōka . citraṁ vidvanmukhābujānāṁ mērutāṁ kurutēnvahaṁ kalyāṇiśaktidēvaṣya vadanāmritadīdhitiṁ . ka . tadanu samudbha
va Īśvarapadakamaḷabhramaranāgamaṁbujāta samabhyudita daśaśatamayūkhaṁ madanōgraṁ mūṟujāvidēva bratipaṁ . toḷapa sudhāṁśuvanudarasthaḷadoḷu
taḷediṁdukāṁtadaṁtire mriḍanujjaḷise nijahridayadoḷagāgaḷu vesevaṁ mūṟujāvidēva munīṁdraṁ . tatsiṣyanakha kujabrajavitsēdanapaṭukuṭhāranurutarunna
tavidvaccaraṇaṁ lakuḷīśvaranaccaguṇāṁbōdhi gurukuḷāṁbudhi caṁdraṁ . tachaṣyaṁ . mānasa vācaka kāyakadēnasamaṁ po¨rddalolladiha parasukhadajñānamane
biṭṭa sivanadhyānadi nelegoṁḍa mūṟujāvi bratipaṁ . sudatiyara nayanagaṇegaḷu madanana pogaṇegaḷamritakiraṇana kiraṇāspadada gaṇe baṁdu tāgalu hri
dayaṁ kaluhridaya mūṟujāvibratipaṁ . Antu negaḷtevetta yādavakulānvayada siṁhaṇō¨rbbīśa tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷumappa śrī hoṁnabaṁmi
seṭiyaru Akhiḷapradhānaparijanaparivritarāgiddoṁdu divasaṁ dha¨rmmakathāprasaṁgadoḷu vijayavanitākaruṣaṇasamudyataraṁtu dha¨rmamaṁ baluviḍiviḍiva
bageyiṁ kaḍaṁbarājyalakṣmībhavanakkadhiṣṭānavāgi¨rda kaḍaṁbēśvaradēvara praviṣṭadalli mallēśvara rājēśvaradēvara pratiṣṭeyaṁ māḍi dha¨rma Ū¨rjjitaṁ māḍikoḍa koḍabēḷkeṁ
du hoṁnaboṁmiseṭṭiyaru prā¨rtthanaṁ māḍidācā¨ryyavī¨ryyarenipa mūṟujāvidēvariṁdavakkuveṁdu manaṁdaṁdarā yatīṁdrana gurukuḷada mahi
mōṁnatiyeṁteṁdaḍe . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭāna japasamādhiśīlaguṇasaṁpaṁnaruṁ gurukuḷasamudharaṇaruṁ
saptāhattaristhānacā¨ryarumappa śrīmadrājaguru mahāvādi mūṟujāvidēvarige sakava¨rṣada 1160 neya viḷaṁbisaṁvatsarada mā¨rgasira māsada sō-©
mavāra vitīpāta Amavāse sū¨ryyagrahaṇadaṁdu śrīhoṁnabomiseṭṭiyaru mūṟujāvidēvara gaṁgājaḷadiṁ pāda prakṣāḷanaṁ māḍi sthaḷavrittiya- ©
nuṁ kaḍaūrumaṁ dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍikoṭṭaru Ā sthaḷada saṁtānamuṁ saṁdhivigrahi bācayya mukhyavāgi sāyira parivāramuṁ nāluvattū
ra prabhugaḷuṁ yi dha¨rmavanu purassararāgi pālisuvaru . kaḍaṁbēśvaradēvara sthaḷavrittiyanu bācaladēviyaru Eḍegōḍu tamagāḷuva kāladalu rā
jatējadiṁda kaḷadukoṁḍaḷu Antā bhūmiyanu mallikā¨rjjanadēvara rājēśvaradēvara pratiṣṭeyaṁ māḍi hoṁnaboṁmiseṭṭiyaru mūṟujāvidēvara pādapra
kṣāḷanaṁ māḍi rājēśvara mallēśvaradēva¨rgge Ā bhūmiyaṁ dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi sthaḷavrittiyāgi koṭṭaru . Adaṟasīme yeṁteṁdaḍe mūkoṟatiya ho
ḷeyiṁda baḍagalu kuṟuvadiṁ mūḍalu vōṇijīyana koḷa Eḍegōḍakeṟeya paḍuvagōḍi mūḍalu sāgaramariyāde . kaḍavūra Eḍegōḍe holavere
jeḷḷigana koḷa Adaṟeṁ mūḍa kaḍavūra kūvaliya holavēre sīgeya koḷa Alliṁdaṁ mūḍalu vonakana moraḍiya mūḍaṇa teṁkaṇa tappalu Alliṁdaṁ teṁ
kalu kaḍavūrigaṁ hāḍegaṁ muttadakoḷa Alliṁdaṁ teṁkalu doḍḍa beṭṭada mūḍaṇa Ettugaṁḍiya naḷugu Ā Ūriṁge teṁkalu habbida beṭṭave mēre . ka
ḍavūrigaṁ siddagērige holavere malleyana moraḍiya mūḍaṇa tappalu Alliṁda baḍagalu bellavattada koḷa habbidaṟe kaḍaūrigaṁ raṭṭapaḷḷigaṁ basuriya
koḷa kaḍavūrigaṁ raṭṭapaḷḷigaṁ tuggilakoḷa kaḍaūrigaṁ raṭṭapaḷḷigaṁ kaḍavadakoḷa kaḍavūrigaṁ raṭṭapaḷḷigaṁ beḷanakoḷa Alliṁda baḍagalu kaḍaṁbēśvaradē
vara sthaḷavrittiya holana sīme kaḍaṁbēśvaradēvara kaḷasava muṭṭi kumudvatiyiṁ mūḍa driṣṭimariyāde Onakana mūraḍiye sīme . © dānapālana
yō¨rmmadhyē dānātbhrēyōṁnapālanaṁ dānātsava¨rgamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . Akarasya karīkā kōṭivadhasmṛtaḥ Apaityaḥ
karabhaṁgēṣu gōkōṭi phalamasnutē . svadatta duguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanāt paradattāpa
paradattaṁ vvā yō harētu vasuṁdharā śaṣṭi¨rva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
doḍeyaru brahmaca¨ryyavilladoḍavaraṁ maṭhadiṁ poravaḍisuvudu maṭhavidu kiṭṭagā .
dakaṇi Enipaṁ brahmaca¨ryyava¨ryyācā¨ryyāgraṇi Enipaṁ sameya
viśvanuta pratiṣṭegaḷani¨rkkeladoḷkaḍaṁbēśvaraṁge mallēśvaravaṁsa
māḍisi māḍisidaṁ viśālakī¨rttiśvara mūṟujāvimu
Digital edition of SII 35.77 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
